name: example
style: Pixar/Disney feature-animation 3D render, subsurface scattering, warm golden-hour volumetric lighting, shallow depth of field, cohesive single world. Do NOT embed legible text (added later as overlays).

style_plate.prompt: A single cohesive STYLE / MOOD PLATE establishing palette, materials and lighting for the film.

hero_sheet.prompt: Character MODEL SHEET for the HERO: turnaround + expression row, on-model with the reference.

guide_sheet.prompt: Character MODEL SHEET for the GUIDE/mascot: hero pose + expressions, on-model with the reference.

room_sheet.prompt: ENVIRONMENT reference sheet for the recurring ROOM: wide establishing angle + detail insets, consistent across interior shots.

shot01_start.prompt: Opening wide establishing shot of the world, before the story begins.

seam_01-02.prompt: The hero appears in the recurring room, front-center, starting the first action.

seam_02-03.prompt: The guide joins the hero in the room; both mid-action.

shot03_end.prompt: Final beat: hero and guide face the camera together, warm closing image.

tomas.title: Apertura
tomas.motion: Smooth push-in from the wide establishing world into the room, settling on the hero.

tomas.title: El encuentro
tomas.motion: A gentle arc as the guide appears beside the hero; both react.
tomas.vo: The hero meets a friendly guide.

tomas.title: Cierre
tomas.motion: The camera settles as hero and guide turn to face the camera, smiling.
tomas.vo: Together, they set out to learn.
